name: musique_ref
source_note: Locally vendored reference dataset in the MuSiQue multi-hop format. Network-free: NOT a live download of the official MuSiQue suite and NOT official leaderboard scores. Tasks test DESi's deterministic hop-graph structuring and gap detection, not LLM accuracy.

tasks.question: where was the director of film X born?
what country is the capital of the author's birthplace in?
who founded the company that makes product P?
